mapper.insert: INSERT INTO business_idempotent(namespace, source, operation_type, business_key, unique_key, idempotent_status, object_version_number, response, create_date, last_modified_date) VALUES (#{namespace}, #{source}, #{operationType}, #{businessKey}, #{uniqueKey}, #{idempotentStatus}, #{objectVersionNumber}, #{response}, #{createDate}, #{lastModifiedDate})
mapper.select: SELECT namespace, source, operation_type, business_key, unique_key, idempotent_status, object_version_number, response, create_date, last_modified_date FROM business_idempotent WHERE unique_key = #{uniqueKey}
